title: Bouncy Air-Fried Russian Perilla-Leaf-Kkaennip Pierogi
description: A kid-friendly Russian dish featuring perilla-leaf-kkaennip, air-fried and keto-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, eggs, salt, xanthan gum, and melted butter.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of ricotta cheese in the center of each dough circle.
Top the cheese with chopped chives and a few perilla-leaf-kkaennip leaves.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Place the pierogi in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Air fry the pierogi at 375°F (190°C) for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the pierogi hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
